PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LA MOGLIA, DENNIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY PLT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOTHING ON SOLE GROUND OF PLT'S REFUSAL TO PARTICIPATE IN AN EUO. NO OPINION IS EXPRESSED ON ANY SUBSTANTIVE ISSUE.
